accept.reason: This project's executable spec lives at dev/docs/REQUIREMENTS.md; the canon check hardcodes dev/requirements/requirements.md and so cannot recognize this repo's doc-first spec commit. Doc-first ordering IS followed here (the REQ change lands in its own commit before the implementation commit) and spec/code binding is enforced by tools/trace.mjs plus the UI gallery. Remove this acceptance once the canon check discovers the project's spec path instead of hardcoding it.
